texto: I had no choice but to accept these voices and images as my gift. My ability. Their energy engrossed my music. I played passionately for them. To set them free. They were part of my life now. I didn't chose them, they chose me."...Elizabeth (DESCENDANT– chapter 2)
explicacao: Citação de L.J. Amodeo sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I had no choice but to accept these voices and images as my gift. My ability. Their energy engros…” articula reflexao, vision, chose em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
